transcript: Customer: This is an emergency, my condenser is blowing warm air and it's getting bad! This is Gary Olsen at 88 Maple Ave. Dispatcher: Okay Gary, stay calm. I'm getting a technician dispatched to 88 Maple Ave right now. Customer: Please hurry. Dispatcher: A tech is on the way, they'll call you when they're close.

expected_entities.issue: emergency: condenser is blowing warm air
